assets.creator: Kuptchi
assets.modifications: Only the first-person arms model, albedo texture, and five generic rifle-arm animation FBX files are bundled for isolated Office3D first-person validation. Weapon meshes are excluded.
assets.notes: Itch page states the pack is free to use by anyone, for anything, without credit, except resale. Keep this as a POC until visual orientation and held-item sockets pass manual review.

assets.creator: para
assets.attributionText: fps arms (rigged only) by para, released under CC0 on OpenGameArt.
assets.modifications: Converted from the OpenGameArt source files to GLB and paired with generated office action clips. Suit sleeves and watch overlay are not rendered by default until wrist binding is visually verified.
assets.notes: Safest legal base for commercial/work-facing first-person arms. Visual polish still needs a suit/watch art pass.

assets.creator: J-Toastie
assets.attributionText: Rigged Fps Arms by J-Toastie, licensed under CC-BY 3.0.
assets.modifications: Copied into the free first-person arms pipeline and paired with generated office action clips because the source GLB has no built-in animations.
assets.notes: Free test rig used until the Sketchfab David Fischer or DJMaesen candidates are downloaded manually.

assets.creator: David Fischer
assets.attributionText: First Person hands rigged by David Fischer, licensed under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
assets.modifications: Not bundled yet because Sketchfab requires authenticated download. Place the downloaded GLB/FBX/Blend in free-fps-arms/david-fischer/ before switching activeRigUrl.
assets.notes: Preferred free candidate once manually downloaded.

assets.creator: DJMaesen
assets.attributionText: First Person arms by DJMaesen, licensed under Creative Commons Attribution 4.0.
assets.modifications: Not bundled yet because Sketchfab requires authenticated download. Place the downloaded GLB/FBX/Blend in free-fps-arms/djmaesen/ before switching activeRigUrl.

assets.creator: J-Toastie
assets.attributionText: Rigged Fps Arms by J-Toastie, licensed under CC-BY 3.0.
assets.modifications: Bundled as a prototype FPS rig; hidden from the main first-person view because it has no required office action clips.
assets.notes: Do not treat as a production first-person arm asset.

assets.creator: Drillimpact
assets.attributionText: PSX First Person Arms by Drillimpact, released under CC0.
assets.modifications: Stored as an animation/reference rig for reach, push, grab, and idle behavior.
assets.notes: Not a final visual style because it is PSX/low-poly.
